_comment: Per-emitter profile. All fields optional; missing fields cause the corresponding gate to abstain. Use `null` to explicitly disable a gate.

_fields.expected_cf: Center frequency the emitter should sit on (Hz). freq_band_gate rejects anything off by more than cf_tol_hz.
_fields.expected_bw: Signal bandwidth (Hz). freq_band_gate rejects anything off by more than bw_tol_hz.
_fields.min_duration_s: Shortest acceptable burst duration (s). duration_gate rejects shorter.
_fields.max_duration_s: Longest acceptable burst duration (s). duration_gate rejects longer.
_fields.min_snr_db: Per-emitter SNR floor. Overrides --min-snr-db on the CLI.
_fields.min_power_dbfs: Raw-IQ power floor (dBFS). power_gate rejects quieter bursts.
